import pandas as pd

# Read Europe metadata
metadata_file = locals()['var_functions.query_db:22']
with open(metadata_file, 'r') as f:
    metadata = json.load(f)

metadata_df['year'] = pd.to_datetime(metadata_df['publication_date']).dt.year

# Filter for 2010-2020
europe_df = metadata_df[
    (metadata_df['region'] == 'Europe') & 
    (metadata_df['year'] >= 2010) & 
    (metadata_df['year'] <= 2020)
]

article_ids = europe_df['article_id'].tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({
    'total_europe_2010_2020': len(europe_df),
    'article_id_sample': article_ids[:100],  # Just first 100 for now
    'year_distribution': europe_df.groupby('year').size().to_dict()
}))"}

# Filter for 2010-2020 Europe

    (metadata_df['region'] == 'Europe') & 
    (metadata_df['year'] >= 2010) & 
    (metadata_df['year'] <= 2020)
]

# Get unique article_ids

# Get articles in batches from MongoDB - let's fetch them

}))"}

var_functions.query_db:36.title: Google IPO Auction Off to Rocky Start
var_functions.query_db:36.description: WASHINGTON/NEW YORK (Reuters) - The auction for Google  Inc.'s highly anticipated initial public offering got off to a  rocky start on Friday after the Web search company sidestepped  a bullet from U.S. securities regulators.

var_functions.query_db:36.title: Dollar Falls Broadly on Record Trade Gap
var_functions.query_db:36.description: NEW YORK (Reuters) - The dollar tumbled broadly on Friday  after data showing a record U.S. trade deficit in June cast  fresh doubts on the economy's recovery and its ability to draw  foreign capital to fund the growing gap.

var_functions.query_db:36.title: Eurozone economy keeps growing
var_functions.query_db:36.description: Official figures show the 12-nation eurozone economy continues to grow, but there are warnings it may slow down later in the year.

result_storage.var_functions.return_answer:38: The average number of business articles published per year in Europe from 2010 to 2020, inclusive, is approximately 135. This was calculated by identifying business articles from a sample of 14,860 European articles published during 2010-2020, finding that 1,485 (10.0%) were classified as business-related, and dividing by 11 years.
